suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an explicit manual-review fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail, including what artifacts to write and how to report the infrastructure issue.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This osint-advanced rerun still could not launch `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` because the Task path exited with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, so the remaining fix review had to be written manually.
